items.title: DHS shutdown looms as Johnson navigates GOP divide over stopgap solutions
items.description: A DHS shutdown appears imminent as Senate Republicans push a short-term funding fix and House conservatives demand a longer extension.

items.title: Harris praises Minneapolis resistance to immigration enforcement as 'beautiful example' for country
items.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris praises Minneapolis immigration enforcement resistance as "beautiful example" during book tour stop in Georgia.

items.title: Homan announces Operation Metro Surge to conclude in Minnesota
items.description: Border czar Tom Homan announced an end to Operation Metro Surge in Minnesota, citing success in reducing public safety threats with state cooperation.

items.title: DEI, climate agenda advanced through progressive-backed lawsuits, new report claims
items.description: New report reveals how progressive activists allegedly use strategic lawsuits to force corporate America into "woke" policies on climate and DEI issue...

items.title: Former Jack Smith deputy involved in prosecuting Trump announces run for office
items.description: J.P. Cooney, who served on the prosecutions of President Donald Trump with special counsel Jack Smith, is running for Congress in Virginia.
